meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Antigravity Template to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate debugging and ship client projects faster. Beginner guide.
content.answer_block: To solve persistent debugging issues, leverage the Antigravity template to enforce strict architectural patterns, reducing cognitive load. By integrating Claude Code, you automate diagnostic analysis and remediation. This combination transforms your workflow from manual error-hunting to high-velocity, intent-based development, ensuring your production code remains clean, scalable, and client-ready.
content.intro:
You are staring at a screen blurred by three hours of 'undefined is not a function.' Your client expects a feature delivery by morning, but your code has become a labyrinth of spaghetti logic and silent failures. The frustration isn't just the bug; it’s the realization that manual debugging is the silent killer of your freelance profit margins.

But what if you didn't have to hunt for errors? The Antigravity project template acts as an architectural exoskeleton, providing a standardized structure that makes bugs visible before they manifest. Combined with Claude Code, you move from being a debugger to an architect, directing an AI agent to clean, refactor, and stabilize your codebase with surgical precision.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the standard project structure to ensure all future debugging tools have predictable file paths and state management patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity standard architecture, prioritizing clean separation of concerns and type safety.

steps.title: Automated Diagnostic Sweep
steps.description: Run an immediate analysis on your existing codebase to identify architectural anti-patterns that contribute to your current bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a deep-dive diagnostic on the current codebase. Identify circular dependencies and state management inconsistencies.

steps.title: Contextual Bug Isolation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map the specific execution path causing your current crashes, focusing on input validation and edge cases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Trace the execution path for [Feature Name] and isolate the variable causing the runtime error.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Trace the execution for the failing feature and pinpoint the exact line triggering the exception.'

steps.title: Implement Defensive Refactoring
steps.description: Apply automated patches using the Antigravity coding style to prevent the issue from recurring in different modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified problematic module to adhere to the Antigravity defensive programming pattern, including error boundaries.

steps.title: Final Verification & Stress Testing
steps.description: Run a final automated check to ensure the fix hasn't introduced regressions in other parts of the application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run full regression testing and verify that the fix is integrated into the Antigravity automated test suite.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Ground Truth' in the Antigravity config file to prevent the AI from hallucinating project-specific file structures.
Use Claude Code's '--watch' flag to auto-trigger diagnostics every time you save a file, catching bugs in real-time.
When debugging, provide the AI with the specific 'Antigravity' design documentation to ensure suggested fixes remain idiomatic to the template.
Keep your prompt history clean by clearing the context after major refactors to prevent 'context fatigue' in the LLM.
Map your client's business requirements to specific Antigravity modules so you can debug by 'Feature' rather than by 'File'.
resources: Effective Prompt Engineering for Developers: https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook
content.next_steps: Once your project is stable, move to implementing automated CI/CD pipelines within your Antigravity template to ensure your client receives updates that are pre-validated by your AI agents.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. With the Antigravity template and Claude Code, you are no longer just a freelancer; you are a high-velocity engineering machine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
